corrections.text: The article attributes the phrase 'addressing supply chokepoints such as China-controlled magnet materials and lithium' to TS2. TS2 supports the China-controlled magnet angle but does not mention lithium. The lithium detail traces instead to the Commerce/NIST release, which states that backup-power systems 'rely on critical minerals (e.g. lithium, cobalt) sourced primarily from China.' Both facts are accurate and present in the article's cited sources; the in-text attribution for the lithium specific should point to the Commerce release rather than TS2.
